title: ItemSorterMod
description: Allows players to sort their inventory quick and put items in containers
body:
ItemSorterMod Overview
===============

Allows you easy to put items in containers with 1 hotkey.
Move all your items from 1 place to the other.
Move stacks of items at once.

Default Config screen hotkey: S + C

Click [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xab4tUIr-5c&ab_channel=Kyzeragon "Tutorial"), to see a tutorial.

## Want to support development?
If you want to support development, check out my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Annevdl29 "Patreon")! Supporting me via Patreon lets me spend more time modding, and allows me to put out more updates for everyone to enjoy.
